title: eremurus ammophilus
intro: Eremurus ammophilus, also known as the beach foxtail or sand fox-tail, is a type of flowering plant in the Asphodelaceae family. It is native to sandy coastal areas in Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eremurus ammophilus include its ability to reduce swelling and combat infections, making it a useful remedy for wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Eremurus ammophilus are typically made from its rhizome and roots, which are used to create teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
